entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Cultivated oilseed crop, Arachis hypogaea L., which is tetraploid and highly self-pollinated

entities.name: TETRAPLOIDY
entities.description: The condition of having four sets of chromosomes, specifically 2n = 40 in groundnut

entities.name: SELF-POLLINATION
entities.description: The reproductive characteristic where the crop is highly self-pollinated

entities.name: CHACO REGION
entities.description: The primary center of origin for groundnut, located between southern Bolivia and northwestern Argentina

entities.name: BOLIVIA
entities.description: Country in South America associated with the center of origin of groundnut

entities.name: ARGENTINA
entities.description: Country in South America associated with the center of origin of groundnut

entities.name: OILSEED CROP
entities.description: Crops grown primarily for the production of oil from their seeds

entities.name: SEASONALLY RAINFED REGIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where crop production depends on seasonal rainfall

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of analyzing the genetic makeup of a composite collection of groundnut

relationships.description: has primary center of origin in
